text.title: Trajectory Eval Setup Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to wire OTel GenAI spans, build the 3-axis rubric, and gate PRs in CI.

step.name: wire-otel-tracer
step.input: Application source + OTLP backend endpoint (Langfuse / Phoenix / Datadog)
step.action: Install opentelemetry-sdk + opentelemetry-exporter-otlp. Initialize tracer at app startup; export to OTLP endpoint over gRPC.
step.output: Tracer instance available app-wide; spans visible in backend UI

step.name: instrument-llm-and-tools
step.input: Tracer instance + LLM client (Anthropic / OpenAI) + tool dispatcher
step.action: Wrap every LLM call in `agent.llm` span with `gen_ai.*` attributes. Wrap every tool call in `agent.tool.<name>` child span with args_hash + outcome + duration_ms.
step.output: Production runs emit full trees of spans per agent run

step.name: build-three-axis-rubric
step.input: Trace store + ground-truth answers + max-acceptable-cost/steps thresholds
step.action: Implement outcome scorer (LLM-as-judge or rule-match), trajectory scorer (steps, loops, tool-misuse), resource scorer (normalized tokens + cost + latency). Each returns 0-1.

step.name: run-eval-suite
step.input: EvalRubric + eval-set of 50+ representative tasks + baseline scores
step.action: Run the agent against the eval set. For each run, ingest spans, compute the 3 scores, write a report matching the JSON Schema in 02-output-contract.xml.

step.name: ci-gate
step.action: Add a CI job that runs the eval on PR diff. Fail the build if any axis regresses > 25% vs baseline (configurable). Surface the failing trace IDs in the PR comment.
step.output: CI gate active; cost regressions caught before merge.
step.decision-gate: If eval flake rate > 5%, the eval is non-deterministic — investigate seed / temperature / cache before tightening gates.
